CustomField.formula: IF ( OR ( AND ( ISPICKVAL (Project__r.Skills__c, "Salesforce"), INCLUDES (Freelancer__r.Skills__c, "Salesforce") ), AND ( ISPICKVAL (Project__r.Skills__c, "Java"), INCLUDES (Freelancer__r.Skills__c, "Java") ), AND ( ISPICKVAL (Project__r.Skills__c, "Python"), INCLUDES (Freelancer__r.Skills__c, "Python") ), AND ( ISPICKVAL (Project__r.Skills__c, "React"), INCLUDES (Freelancer__r.Skills__c, "React") ) ), 50, 0 ) + IF (Freelancer__r.Experience__c >= Project__r.Experience__c, 50, 0)
CustomField.label: Match Score
